description_long: This is a compact, single-axle utility trailer with a rectangular cargo bed and a teal blue painted metal body. The trailer features corrugated metal side panels and a matching tailgate, which is equipped with a license plate, reflectors, and rear lights. The bed is open-topped, allowing for easy loading and unloading of goods, and the interior shows signs of wear and rust, indicating frequent use. The trailer is supported by two robust wheels with visible tires and fenders, and it has a black metal frame and a ball hitch at the front for towing. Metal handles and protective bars are mounted at the corners for maneuvering and added durability. There is some faded yellow signage on the side, and a set of keys is attached to the hitch mechanism.
description: A teal blue, open-topped metal utility trailer with two wheels, a ball hitch, and rear lights, showing signs of wear and faded signage. The trailer is designed for hauling cargo and features a sturdy, corrugated metal bed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ball hitch, black frame, and the open cargo bed with corrugated metal floor.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the single axle, one visible wheel, fender, and faded yellow signage on the side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tailgate with license plate, reflectors, rear lights, and protective corner bars.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other wheel, fender, and the open cargo bed.
attribute_branding_or_signage: faded yellow signage on side panel
